tasks.description: Verify that the parsing of the mirrorlist safely reads the file line-by-line without executing its contents or introducing command injection vulnerabilities.
Verify that trap commands safely handle variable expansion without introducing command injection risks or masking exit codes.
Verify that trap commands safely handle variable expansion without introducing command injection risks or masking exit codes.
Ensure no sensitive URLs, internal IPs, or credentials are leaked in the documentation updates.
Audit the updated documentation files to confirm no credentials, internal IP addresses, or sensitive URLs are exposed.
Audit the troubleshooting guide to ensure no insecure workarounds or dangerous commands are recommended to users.
Verify the installation of the python-yaml package from official Arch Linux repositories does not alter execution boundaries or inadvertently expose the CI runner to supply chain attacks.
Audit the updated systemd service units to ensure sandboxing is correctly applied and prevents privilege escalation or unauthorized file system access.
